name: Artichokes Romas Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the outer leaves of the artichokes and cut off the tops.
2. Place the artichokes in cold water mixed with lemon juice and let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Arrange the artichokes around the sides of a heavy casserole.
4. Put the quartered onions in the middle. Sprinkle with garlic, marjoram, broth, salt, and pepper.
5. Cover and bring to boil over high heat.
6. Reduce heat to low and simmer gently, still covered, for 20 minutes.
7. Serve.
